word: G1735 - ἐνδέχεται - endéchetai - en-dekh'-et-ahee - Can be

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to receive, approve of, admit, allow
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Third person singular present of a compound of G1722 and G1209; (impersonally) it is accepted in, that is, admitted (possible): - can (+ not) be.
